bubble.save_suggestion_target_prompt: Where should I save this conversation?

noteUpdateReview.title: Note edit proposal
noteUpdateReview.diffSummary: {changedBlocks} changed blocks · {addedWords} added words · {removedWords} removed words
noteUpdateReview.staleWarning: If the note changes before apply, OpenCairn treats the preview as stale and asks for a fresh preview.
noteUpdateReview.staleError: The note changed after this preview, so the edit was not applied. Create a fresh preview.
noteUpdateReview.applyFailed: Could not apply the note edit proposal.
noteUpdateReview.cancelFailed: Could not cancel the note edit proposal.

codeProjectReview.title: Code patch proposal
codeProjectReview.staleWarning: If the code workspace changes before apply, OpenCairn treats the patch as stale and asks for a fresh proposal.
codeProjectReview.applyFailed: Could not apply the code patch proposal.
codeProjectReview.cancelFailed: Could not cancel the code patch proposal.

codeInstallReview.installNetworkWarning: Approving starts a sandboxed install that requires network access.
codeInstallReview.installApplyFailed: Could not start the dependency install.
codeInstallReview.installCancelFailed: Could not cancel the dependency install request.

codePreviewReview.previewWarning: Approving creates an internal sandbox preview from the snapshot's static files.
codePreviewReview.previewApplyFailed: Could not create the static preview.
codePreviewReview.previewCancelFailed: Could not cancel the static preview request.
codePreviewReview.resultWarning: This preview opens through an internal API path, not a public deployment URL.

agenticPlan.title: Agentic plan
agenticPlan.goalPrompt: Describe the outcome you want the agents to coordinate.
agenticPlan.cancelConfirm: Cancelling this step moves it to a terminal state. Continue?
agenticPlan.actionFailed: Could not update the agentic plan.

workflowConsole.title: Run status
workflowConsole.evidenceSummary: {count, plural, one {# evidence item} other {# evidence items}} {status}

documentGeneration.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# source selected} other {# sources selected}}
documentGeneration.promptPlaceholder: Describe the document goal and what it should include.
documentGeneration.figurePromptPlaceholder: Describe the figure purpose, relationships, and emphasis.
documentGeneration.figureSourceRequired: Select at least one source for the figure.

presetPrompt.pdfReportFast: Create a shareable PDF report from the current project material.
presetPrompt.pdfReportLatex: Create a paper-style LaTeX PDF report from the current project material.
presetPrompt.docxReport: Create an editable DOCX report from the current project material.
presetPrompt.pptxDeck: Turn the current project material into a presentation deck.
presetPrompt.xlsxTable: Organize the current project material into a comparable spreadsheet.
presetPrompt.sourceFigure: Create a figure that explains the key project material.

documentGeneration.sourceRequired: Select at least one source for the document.

qualitySignal.metadata_fallback: Using metadata instead of body text

composer.dropHint: Drop to pin it to this question

command.decompose: Break down structure, claims, and evidence

prompt.summarize: Summarize the current material around the core points.
prompt.decompose: Break down the current material by structure, claims, evidence, and gaps.
prompt.factcheck: Check the current claims and evidence, and mark uncertain parts.
prompt.extract_citations: Extract the key sentences and sources worth citing from the current material.
prompt.make_note: Turn the current material into a new note draft.
prompt.narrate_note: Draft the core flow and script for turning the current note into audio narration.
prompt.generate_report: Create a report draft from the current project material.
prompt.generate_figure: Use the current project material to prepare an explanatory figure or diagram direction.
prompt.generate_deck: Turn the current material into a presentation outline.
prompt.make_table: Organize the current material into a comparable table.
prompt.quiz: Create comprehension questions from the current material.
prompt.attach: Help me choose material to attach.
prompt.paper_search: Find related papers and summarize the strongest candidates.
prompt.research: Start a research task from the current project material.

contextTray.externalAllowed: Web and external search can be used.
contextTray.externalOff: Only OpenCairn material will be used.

empty_state.title: New conversation
empty_state.intro: Type below. The first message creates the conversation.
empty_state.hint: Use the reference scope to see and adjust what the agent can read.

points.workspace: Reads notes, projects, and run status together.
points.scope: Use the reference scope below to choose current document, pinned sources, or the whole project.
